overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city with futuristic architecture, neon billboards, and reflective wet surfaces. The footage is clearly from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring dense urban environment with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with geometric metal facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beside a futuristic building with angular metallic architecture

entered.detail: futuristic building with angular metallic facade and embedded neon lighting strips
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy futuristic city street, walking alongside a distinctive geometric metal building. The wet pavement reflects the ambient neon lighting while sparse pedestrians and vehicles move through the narrow urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with traffic control

events.description: passing traffic light pole displaying speed limit 40
pedestrian density increases with more people carrying umbrellas

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching an intersection, navigating through increasing pedestrian traffic

person in white hoodie and shorts walking past camera

entered.detail: tall black pole with traffic signals and speed limit signage
large commercial building with prominent WET DREAM digital billboards
tall palm trees visible in the distance lining the avenue

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider street approaching a major intersection. The camera passes a traffic light pole while the distinctive WET DREAM building becomes visible ahead. Pedestrian traffic increases with many carrying umbrellas, and palm trees appear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with commercial facades

turning right onto palm tree-lined street with illuminated storefronts

black luxury car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: illuminated entrance canopy with warm interior lighting
yellow zebra crossing stripes on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a busy intersection crosswalk surrounded by dense pedestrian traffic. The WET DREAM building dominates the left side while palm trees line the right. After crossing, the scene transitions to a new street with glowing storefront entrances.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial avenue with parked vehicles and palm trees

events.description: passing parked limousine and yellow taxi at the curb

agents.ego_description: walking down the street past parked vehicles and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt carrying items walking ahead

entered.detail: long black luxury vehicle parked at the curb
yellow taxi cab parked further down the street
tall building with reflective glass facade rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down a palm-lined commercial street with parked vehicles including a prominent black limousine. The WET DREAM building recedes behind as the camera moves toward a distant glass skyscraper, with wet sidewalks reflecting the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk district that evolves from a narrow urban canyon into a wide, palm-lined commercial boulevard. It begins by walking alongside a geometric metal building on a wet street where neon lights reflect off the pavement amidst sparse traffic. As the camera approaches a major intersection, the view opens up to reveal the towering Wet Dream building ahead and a growing crowd of pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The scene then pushes through a busy crosswalk surrounded by dense foot traffic and palm trees before transitioning onto a new street characterized by glowing storefront entrances. Finally, the camera moves past parked vehicles and a black limousine, leaving the Wet Dream building behind as it advances toward a distant glass skyscraper under the shimmering reflections of the rainy city.
